productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex Red Flip Flops
description: Style Note Happy little feet in colour pop brights - this pair of flip flops from warner bros knows how to capture your little one's heart. The flip flops have cartoon characters that are printed on a bright upper - grab a pair with your little one's favourite cartoon on it! Product Details Red flip flops with thong straps Footbed with Looney Tunes characters printed on it Soft rubber outsole with patterns on it Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight
